meaning: n.下落,行踪,所在之处adv.在何处n.(用作单或复)行踪,下落,所在
examples: She enquired as to your whereabouts.
She has refused to reveal the whereabouts of her daughter.
She disclaimed any knowledge of her husband's whereabouts.
An official in the RAB said authorities had been tipped off as to his whereabouts.
His whereabouts were a mystery for the next nine years, despite the bounty on his head.
